name: Meatballs Extraordinaire
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together the meat, egg, onion, and salt until well combined.
2. Form the mixture into 100 small meatballs.
3. Cook the meatballs until they are well browned and any excess fat is drained off.
4. Combine the chili sauce, grape jelly, and lemon juice in a separate bowl.
5. Pour the sauce mixture over the meatballs.
6. Simmer everything together in a skillet until heated through (or use a crockpot on low heat until serving time).
7. Serve the meatballs in a heated chafing dish as appetizers.
